scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c magenta,cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w @agenda/api" "npm run dev -w @agenda/web" "npm run worker -w @agenda/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agenda/api && npm run build -w @agenda/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @agenda/api && npm run test -w @agenda/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @agenda/api && npm run lint -w @agenda/web
scripts.start:prod: node prisma/predeploy.mjs && prisma db push --skip-generate && prisma db seed && node apps/api/dist/src/main.js
